---
title: "Full Page Check"
filters:
  - quarto-exercises
quarto-exercises:
  check-mode: page
  score: true
  reveal: false
  reset: true
---

This page demonstrates check-mode: page. The page has one Check Page button and one Reset Page button for all exercises. Each question still keeps its own options, including points, shuffle, and reveal. For the authoring pattern, see the [Reference page](reference.qmd).

## Ringbearer (2 points)

::: {.exercise data-testid="page-ring" points=2 shuffle=true}
Who carried the One Ring out of the Shire?

::: {.answer correct=true}
Frodo Baggins
:::

::: {.answer}
Boromir
:::
:::

## Fellowship (3 points)

::: {.exercise data-testid="page-fellowship" points=3 reveal=false}
Select all hobbits in the Fellowship.

::: {.answer correct=true}
Frodo Baggins
:::

::: {.answer correct=true}
Samwise Gamgee
:::

::: {.answer}
Legolas Greenleaf
:::
:::

## Inline answer (1 point)

::: {.exercise data-testid="page-blank" points=1}
The wizard who guides the Fellowship is [`Gandalf`]{.blank answer="Gandalf"}.
:::
